assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 23-28 show: 'git checkout TC-9005' followed by 'git pull' and then 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The plan explicitly checks out TC-9005 (the feature branch), not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 32 shows: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. The PR explicitly targets TC-9005 as the base branch.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 28 shows: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' creating the task branch. Line 19 explicitly states: 'The task branch is named TC-9205 (the task issue ID, not the feature branch ID)'. The branch is distinct from TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 42-49 under 'Pre-Implementation Code Inspection (Constraint 1.5)' explicitly lists inspecting: (1) 'migration/src/lib.rs', (2) 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs', and (3) 'entity/src/advisory.rs'. All three files from the assertion are mentioned.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 74 shows: "With trailer: `--trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code'`". Line 78 shows the full git commit command including: "git commit --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' -m ..."

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 64 shows the commit message subject: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows Conventional Commits format (type=feat, scope=migration). Line 71 shows the footer: 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 8-9 state: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch)' and 'Linked Feature: TC-9005 (this task is incorporated by TC-9005)'. Lines 13-19 under 'Target Branch Handling' explicitly state: 'The task's Target Branch is TC-9005, which is a feature branch (not main)' and detail the implications for branching and PR targeting.
